# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  networkSecurityGroup_name: 
    type: string
    default: MyNetworkSecurityGroup

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  name: "[parameters('networkSecurityGroup_name')]"
  apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
  location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
    - name: allow_rdp
      protocol: Tcp
      sourcePortRange: "*"
      destinationPortRange: "3389"
      sourceAddressPrefix: "Internet"
      destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
      access: Allow
      priority: 100
    - name: allow_ssh
      protocol: Tcp
      sourcePortRange: "*"
      destinationPortRange: "22"
      sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
      destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
      access: Allow
      priority: 110
    - name: allow_http
      protocol: Tcp
      sourcePortRange: "*"
      destinationPortRange: "80"
      sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
      destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
      access: Allow
      priority: 120
    - name: allow_https
      protocol: Tcp
      sourcePortRange: "*"
      destinationPortRange: "443"
      sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
      destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
      access: Allow
      priority: 130
